title: AST SpaceMobile Secures $43 Million Government Contract with Space Development Agency
text: AST SpaceMobile announced a $43 million contract award in support of the United States Space Development Agency (SDA) through a prime contractor. As part of the U.S. Space Force, SDA will accelerate delivery of needed space-based capabilities to the joint warfighter to support terrestrial missions through development, fielding, and operation of the Proliferated Warfighter Space Architecture. This contract demonstrates growing government confidence in ASTS's satellite technology. In addition to the SDA contract, AST SpaceMobile previously won a $30 million contract from Space Systems Command to demonstrate space-based cellular broadband network capabilities connected to military communications devices. These government contracts represent significant validation of ASTS's direct-to-device technology and expand the company's revenue opportunities beyond commercial mobile network operators.
